_meta.purpose: Four-class campaign Phase 4 (CLASS 4). EXPLICIT registry of laws cited anywhere in the product that are deliberately NOT in the §-corpus (monument laws, municipal ordinances, procedure/execution ordinances, fee schedules). Each is documented + justified so the gates treat it as KNOWN-unverifiable rather than silently trusting it — and so any UNREGISTERED out-of-corpus citation FAILS the build-time gates (audit:allowlist + audit:four-class). Turns 'accept any out-of-corpus citation' into 'accept only these justified ones'.
_meta.note: These are real provisions accepted at authoring time; they are NOT existence/heading-verifiable until the law is ingested into scripts/legal-corpus (deferred to a dedicated corpus-ingestion sprint). The runtime Layer-C firewall (citationLint) still trusts the allow-list; this registry guarantees that allow-list contains only registered, justified out-of-corpus entries.

BayDSchG.reason: Bayerisches Denkmalschutzgesetz — state monument-protection law, not a Bauordnung; not in the §-corpus.
BayDSchG.verification: authored from primary source (gesetze-bayern.de) in the Bayern legal spine; re-verify on ingestion.

StPlS.reason: München Stellplatzsatzung 926 — municipal ordinance (Satzung), not a state §-law; deliberately out of the state §-corpus.
StPlS.verification: authored from the München Stellplatzsatzung in the Bayern/München spine; municipal — not a corpus-ingestion target.

BauuntPrüfVO.reason: Rheinland-Pfalz Verordnung über bautechnische Prüfungen — procedure/execution ordinance, not the LBauO; not in the §-corpus.
BauuntPrüfVO.verification: authored in the phase-c RLP structural-cert fix; re-verify on ingestion.

DSchG.reason: State Denkmalschutzgesetz family (the 16 states' monument laws: DSchG, DSchG NRW, HDSchG, NDSchG, SächsDSchG, DSchPflG, …) — monument law, not a Bauordnung; out of the §-corpus.
DSchG.verification: monument-law family; ingestion is its own deferred sprint.

LBOVVO.reason: Procedure/execution ordinances to the Landesbauordnungen (LBOVVO / LBOAVO etc.) — not the LBO itself; not in the §-corpus.
LBOVVO.verification: procedure-ordinance family; deferred to corpus-ingestion sprint.

HOAI.reason: Honorarordnung für Architekten und Ingenieure — federal fee schedule, not a building-permit law; out of the §-corpus by design.
HOAI.verification: fee schedule; not a corpus-ingestion target.
